title: Ensure legacy networks does not exist

input_row.title: Ensure legacy networks does not exist
input_row.description: In order to prevent use of legacy networks, ECS instances should not have a legacy network configured.
input_row.rationale: Legacy networks have a single network IPv4 prefix range and a single gateway IP address for the whole network. With legacy networks, you cannot create subnetworks or switch from legacy to auto or custom subnet networks. Legacy networks can thus have an impact for high network traffic ECS instance and subject to the single point of failure.
input_row.audit: 1. Logon to ECS Console 2. In the left-side navigation pane, choose Instance & Image > Instances. 3. Check all ECS instances to ensure the Network Type is not classic
input_row.remediation: 1. Logon to ECS Console 2. In the left-side navigation pane, choose Instance & Image > Instances. 3. Click Create Instance. 4. Specify the basic instance information required by following the instruction and click Next: Networking. 5. Select the Network Type of VPC.
input_row.default_value: By default the ECS are created with VPC Network Type.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. Log on to the Alibaba Cloud Console.
2. In the left-side navigation pane, choose **Instances** under **Instance & Image**.
3. Review the list of ECS instances displayed.
4. For each ECS instance, check the **Network Type** column to ensure it is not set to "Classic" (legacy).
5. If any instance shows "Classic" as the Network Type, note it for remediation.

**What to verify/validate:**
- The Network Type of each ECS instance should be VPC.

**Expected secure configuration:**
- The ECS instances should be configured with VPC as the Network Type.

**How to confirm compliance:**
- Compliance is confirmed when all ECS instances are using VPC and none are configured as Classic. If any instances are Classic, appropriate remediation steps should be taken to replace them with VPC instances.
